case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ERICA CORONA et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, ERICA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORONA, ERICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 154 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS.**
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION; MEMO OF P & A AND POS FILED BY DEFENDANT CORONA, ERICA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, ERICA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED FEB-10-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, ERICA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED FEB-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, ERICA

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CORONA, ERICA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, ERICA
